mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_summary (session_id, summary, covered_until_message_id, covered_message_count, token_estimate, version, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), #{summary}, CAST(#{coveredUntilMessageId} AS uuid), #{coveredMessageCount}, #{tokenEstimate}, #{version}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, summary, covered_until_message_id, covered_message_count, token_estimate, version, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM session_summary WHERE session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM session_summary WHERE session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid)
